mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO NHEBILL.TB_CO_INSA ( USER_ID ,USER_NM ,DEPT_C ,DEPT_NM ,EMP_STSC ,GNAF_DSC ,EMPL_DSC ,DWIN_TEL ,REP_TEL ,CUST_TEL ,HP_NO ,EMAIL ,CHRG_BSN_NM ,DTI_CHRG_BSN_NM ,OFT_C ,OFT_NM ,PZC_C ,PZC_NM ,FSRGDTM ,FSRGID )
SELECT '${item.USER_ID}' ,'${item.USER_NM}' ,'${item.DEPT_C}' ,'${item.DEPT_NM}' ,'${item.EMP_STSC}' ,'${item.GNAF_DSC}' ,'${item.EMPL_DSC}' ,'${item.DWIN_TEL}' ,'${item.REP_TEL}' ,'${item.CUST_TEL}' ,'${item.HP_NO}' ,'${item.EMAIL}' ,'${item.CHRG_BSN_NM}' ,'${item.DTI_CHRG_BSN_NM}' ,'${item.OFT_C}' ,'${item.OFT_NM}' ,'${item.PZC_C}' ,'${item.PZC_NM}' ,SYSDATE ,'NhePro' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT '1' FROM NHEBILL.TB_CO_INSA WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID})
mapper.update: UPDATE NHEBILL.TB_CO_INSA SET USER_NM = USER_NM--USER_NM ,DEPT_C = REPLACE(DEPT_C,'#','')--DEPT_C ,DEPT_NM = REPLACE(DEPT_NM,'#','')--DEPT_NM ,EMP_STSC = REPLACE(EMP_STSC,'#','')--EMP_STSC ,GNAF_DSC = REPLACE(GNAF_DSC,'#','')--GNAF_DSC ,EMPL_DSC = REPLACE(EMPL_DSC,'#','')--EMPL_DSC ,DWIN_TEL = DWIN_TEL--DWIN_TEL ,REP_TEL = REP_TEL--REP_TEL ,CUST_TEL = CUST_TEL--CUST_TEL ,HP_NO = HP_NO--HP_NO ,EMAIL = EMAIL--EMAIL ,CHRG_BSN_NM = REPLACE(CHRG_BSN_NM,'#','')--CHRG_BSN_NM ,DTI_CHRG_BSN_NM = REPLACE(DTI_CHRG_BSN_NM,'#','')--DTI_CHRG_BSN_NM ,OFT_C = REPLACE(OFT_C,'#','')--OFT_C ,OFT_NM = REPLACE(OFT_NM,'#','')--OFT_NM ,PZC_C = REPLACE(PZC_C,'#','')--PZC_C ,PZC_NM = REPLACE(PZC_NM,'#','')--PZC_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NHEBILL.TB_CO_ORGZ ( DEPT_C ,ONL_C ,UP_DEPT_C ,DEPT_NM ,SQNO ,STSC ,NH_CORP_CODE ,GIRO_C ,CORP_NO ,ADDR ,ZIP ,REP_TEL ,CUST_TEL ,FAX ,DOC_DEPT_C ,PROV_C ,SUB_BRC ,FSRGDTM ,FSRGID ) SELECT #{DEPT_C}--DEPT_C ,#{ONL_C}--ONL_C ,#{UP_DEPT_C}--UP_DEPT_C ,#{DEPT_NM}--DEPT_NM ,#{SQNO}--SQNO ,#{STSC}--STSC ,#{NH_CORP_CODE}--NH_CORP_CODE ,#{GIRO_C}--GIRO_C ,CASE WHEN #{DEPT_C} = '09155' THEN '1068195255' ELSE replace(#{CORP_NO},'-','') END AS CORP_NO --CORP_NO ,#{ADDR}--ADDR ,#{ZIP}--ZIP ,#{REP_TEL}--REP_TEL ,#{CUST_TEL}--CUST_TEL ,#{FAX}--FAX ,#{DOC_DEPT_C}--DOC_DEPT_C ,replace(#{PROV_C},'|','')--PROV_C ,#{SUB_BRC}--SUB_BRC ,SYSDATE--FSRGDTM ,'NhePro'--FSRGID FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT '1' FROM NHEBILL.TB_CO_ORGZ WHERE DEPT_C = #{DEPT_C}) AND #{NH_CORP_CODE} IN ('1','2','3','5','A','B','C','D')
UPDATE NHEBILL.TB_CO_ORGZ SET ADDR = ADDR--ADDR ,ZIP = ZIP--ZIP ,REP_TEL = REP_TEL--REP_TEL ,CUST_TEL = CUST_TEL--CUST_TEL ,FAX = FAX--FAX
